item.description:
What's new in 0.4.0

  • Instant draft transcripts — recordings are readable seconds after you hit Stop, then replaced automatically by the accurate transcript.
  • Live processing view — watch transcription, speaker detection, summary and more happen in real time.
  • Cleaner output everywhere — summaries and recaps render with real headings, lists and tables; transcripts show speaker turns with clickable timestamps; set your own name for the "Me" speaker.
  • Recording reliability — fixes for two crashes and a Bluetooth-related freeze; the recorder now auto-selects a real microphone when your default input is virtual (e.g. BlackHole) or Bluetooth.
  • Faster, lighter uploads and an under-the-hood reliability program (tuned for 24 GB Macs).
